title: Assistant Store Manager - Liberty Shoes - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Liberty Shoes - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Liberty Shoes! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Liberty Shoes:
Liberty Shoes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes!
